description: The natural flow of words and ideas between people in shared presence. Conversation encompasses casual exchange, the rhythm of speaking and listening, emergent understanding, and the recognition that conversation weaves community.
rationale: The word 'noika' flows from continuous 'no' through bright 'i' (creating vowel hiatus) to strong 'ka'. Using only vowel hiatus, this three-syllable progression captures conversation as ongoing flow crystallizing into connection.
